# Social Preview Image

Create a 1200x630 PNG image for GitHub repository social preview.

Suggested design:
- Background: Dark blue gradient (#0f172a to #1e293b)
- Center: Earthquake wave icon or phone with sensor waves
- Text: "SismoNetwork" in large white font
- Subtitle: "Phone-Based Earthquake Early Warning"
- Corner badge: "Open Source" or "v0.1.0"

Tools to create:
- Canva (free)
- Figma
- GIMP

Upload at: Settings → Social preview
